publications.document_name: Robust phase stabilization of a dark quantum channel over a 120 km deployed fiber link
publications.summary: We present a scalable solution for phase stabilization of dark metropolitan-scale fiber links using wavelength division multiplexing (WDM).

publications.document_name: Low-frequency cryocoolers are compressed inefficiently
publications.summary: Millikelvin refrigerators are enabling tools for many fields of modern science, including quantum information processing.

publications.document_name: QDFlow: A Python package for physics simulations of quantum dot devices
publications.summary: Recent advances in machine learning (ML) have accelerated progress in calibrating and operating quantum dot (QD) devices.

publications.document_name: Localized quasiparticles in a quasi-two-dimensional fluxonium
publications.summary: The abstract discusses disordered superconducting materials with high kinetic inductance as critical components for introducing nonlinearity in quantum circuits, enhancing their performance.

publications.document_name: Electrical interconnects for silicon spin qubits
publications.summary: Scalable spin qubit devices will likely require long-range qubit interconnects. We propose to create such an interconnect with a resistive topgate.

publications.document_name: Bootstrapping, autonomous testing, and initialization system for Si/Si$_x$Ge$_1-x}$ multi-quantum-dot devices
publications.summary: Semiconductor quantum dot (QD) devices have become central to advancements in spin-based quantum computing.

publications.document_name: Chirped magneto-optical trap of molybdenum
publications.summary: We have directly loaded a cryogenic beam of molybdenum atoms into a magneto-optical trap.

publications.document_name: Observation of a fault tolerance threshold with concatenated codes
publications.summary: The protocol proposes a fault-tolerant method for code concatenation using a butterfly network architecture that can handle high noise levels while minimizing ancilla requirements.

publications.document_name: Broadband pulsed quadrature measurements with calorimeters
publications.summary: A general one-dimensional quantum optical mode is described by a shape in the time or frequency domain.

publications.document_name: Detection of Surface Spins Causing Flux Noise in Quantum Devices using Electron Spin Resonance
publications.summary: The improvement of quantum computing technologies relies on the reduction of flux noise that contributes to decoherence.

publications.document_name: Argon-Ion Treatment of Multi-Material Layered Surface-Electrode Traps for Noise Mitigation
publications.summary: Electric-field noise near ion-trap electrodes limits motional coherence and represents a key obstacle to scaling trapped-ion quantum systems.

publications.document_name: Robust Two-Qubit Geometric Phase Gates using Amplitude and Frequency Ramping
publications.summary: We demonstrate a method for generating entanglement between trapped atomic ions based on adiabatically ramped state-dependent forces.

publications.document_name: Towards a quantum repeater using a surface-trap-integrated microcavity and trapped ions
publications.summary: Trapped ions are a leading candidate for the "stationary qubits" of a quantum network.

publications.document_name: Compatibility of trapped ions and dielectrics at cryogenic temperatures
publications.summary: The study examines how an unshielded optical fiber affects a $^{40}$Ca$^+$ ion held at a distance of several hundred micrometers.

publications.document_name: Single-photon time-of-flight measurements for benchmarking time transfer in quantum networks
publications.summary: This method aims to benchmark fiber-path delay estimation using a single-photon ToF measurement in optical two-way time and frequency transfer.

publications.document_name: A fault-tolerant neutral-atom architecture for universal quantum computation
publications.summary: Quantum error correction (QEC) is believed to be essential for the realization of large-scale quantum computers.

publications.document_name: Clock precision beyond the Standard Quantum Limit at 10 -18 level
publications.summary: The primary problem addressed is achieving clock precision beyond the Standard Quantum Limit, specifically at 10^-18 level, and the specific solution involves advanced quantum technologies.

publications.document_name: Unraveling spin entanglement using quantum gates with scanning tunneling microscopy-driven electron spin resonance
publications.summary: Controlling the generation and detection of quantum entanglement is crucial for advancing scalable quantum information processing.

publications.document_name: Solitons in thermal gas stabilized by photon-mediated interactions in an optical cavity
Temperature-Compensated Multi-Level CMOS Modulators Operating from 10 K to 300 K for Cryogenic Interconnects
publications.summary: Temperature-compensated cryogenic CMOS modulators are developed for reliable operation across a wide thermal range from 10 K to 300 K, essential for both internal and external cryogenic systems. These modulators must endure extreme conditions without degradation in performance or stability, which is critical for their intended applications.

publications.document_name: Scalable and fault-tolerant preparation of encoded k-uniform states
publications.summary: k-uniform states are valuable resources in quantum information, enabling tasks such as teleporta- tion, error correction, and accelerated quantum simulations.

publications.document_name: Efficient production of sodium Bose-Einstein condensates in a hybrid trap
publications.summary: An apparatus efficiently generating sodium-23 Bose-Einstein condensates through a quadrupole magnetic and optical hybrid trap is described. The system's operational constraints include precise control over temperature and magnetic field intensity to achieve this quantum state.

publications.document_name: Accurate Unsupervised Photon Counting from Transition Edge Sensor Signals
publications.summary: The primary problem is to classify signals from voltage traces of transition edge sensors (TES), which are photon-number resolving detectors. The specific solution involves comparing various methods applicable to these traces.

publications.document_name: Fault-tolerant hyperbolic Floquet quantum error correcting codes
publications.summary: The primary goal is to minimize the overhead in fault-tolerant quantum computing by enhancing noise thresholds and decreasing the required number of physical qubits per logical qubit.

publications.document_name: Atomic Coherence of over 100 s and 1-s Instability of 1.5x10 -18 in a Wannier-Stark Lattice Clock
publications.summary: The study achieves atomic coherence lasting over 100 seconds while observing an instability of 1. 5x10^-18 in a Wannier-Stark lattice clock, indicating improvements in long-term stability and coherence.

publications.document_name: Atomistic tight-binding Hartree-Fock calculations of multielectron configurations in P-doped silicon devices: Wavefunction reshaping
publications.summary: Donor-based quantum devices in silicon are attractive platforms for universal quantum computing and analog quantum simulations.

publications.document_name: Error-corrected fermionic quantum processors with neutral atoms
publications.summary: The primary problem is improving quantum processors' reliability by correcting errors in fermionic systems using neutral atoms, which specifically addresses the issue of decoherence and noise.

publications.document_name: Emergent Unitary Designs for Encoded Qubits from Coherent Errors and Syndrome Measurements
publications.summary: Unitary k-designs are distributions of unitary gates that match the Haar distribution up to its k-th statistical moments.

publications.document_name: Symmetry-protected toplological optical lattice clock
publications.summary: This research focuses on developing a clock based on symmetry-protected topological properties in an optical lattice, offering enhanced stability and precision. The specific methodology involves designing the lattice structure to exploit these topological features for improved timekeeping.

publications.document_name: BenchQC: A Benchmarking Toolkit for Quantum Computation
publications.summary: The primary problem addressed is approximating ground-state energies in molecular and material systems, and the specific solution is the Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE), a hybrid classical-quantum algorithm.

publications.document_name: Single-photon Sources and Detectors Dictionary
publications.summary: Single-photon detectors and sources are characterized using specific terms and metrics aimed at improving the accuracy of measurements in quantum communication systems. These definitions address the limitations and operational constraints faced when working with ultra-weak signals, ensuring reliable performance under diverse experimental conditions.

publications.document_name: Measurable Improvement in Multi-Qubit Readout Using a Kinetic Inductance Traveling Wave Parametric Amplifier
publications.summary: Superconducting quantum computing benefits significantly from readout chains operating very near the Quantum Limit (QL) of added noise.

publications.document_name: Error mitigation thresholds in noisy random quantum circuits
publications.summary: Extracting useful information from noisy near-term quantum simulations requires error mitigation strategies.

publications.document_name: High-Stability Single-Ion Clock with 5.5 x 10^-19 Systematic Uncertainty
publications.summary: We report a single-ion optical atomic clock with fractional frequency uncertainty of 5. 5 x 10^-19 and frequency stability of 3.

publications.document_name: Variable Bell states in a polarization-entangled photon source
publications.summary: Bell states are fundamental resources in quantum optics, underpinning a range of applications in quantum computation and communication.

publications.document_name: Radial polarization imaging of entangled biphoton state
publications.summary: Polarization entanglement of single photons is essential for enabling quantum 2. 0 applications, including quantum computing, networks, and sensing.

publications.document_name: Fault-Tolerant Compiling of Classically Hard Instantaneous Quantum Polynomial Circuits on Hypercubes
publications.summary: Quantum computational advantage is challenging to maintain asymptotically in the presence of noise.

publications.document_name: Dynamics of single photon emission from a quantum dot emitting photons at a telecom wavelength
publications.summary: We investigate the dynamics of single-photon emission from a near C-band quantum dot using a time-resolved Hanbury Brown and Twiss experiment.

publications.document_name: MEMSDuino: An Arduino-Based MEMS Switch Controller
publications.summary: Radio frequency cryogenic switches enable calibration and high throughput testing in quantum information science by providing critical control mechanisms at low temperatures.

publications.document_name: Modular Autonomous Virtualization System for Two-Dimensional Semiconductor Quantum Dot Arrays
publications.summary: Arrays of gate-defined semiconductor quantum dots are among the leading candidates for building scalable quantum processors.

publications.document_name: Measurement-induced phase transitions in monitored infinite-range interacting systems
publications.summary: This research focuses on identifying phase transitions in infinite-range interacting systems through measurement-induced effects, proposing a methodology to monitor such systems under continuous observation.

publications.document_name: Enabling phase stabilization of quantum networks via displacement-enhanced photon counting
publications.summary: Optical phase stabilization, tracking, and locking mechanisms are essential for ensuring reliable data transmission in long fiber links used in communication systems. These processes must operate under stringent conditions to maintain precision over extended distances, significantly impacting the overall performance and accuracy of distributed sensor networks.

presentations.document_name: Initial Public Draft NIST IR 8587: Protecting Tokens and Assertions from Forgery, Theft, and Misuse: Implementation Recommendations for Agencies and Cloud Service Providers
NCCoE Roadmap and Select Project Overviews

news.title: NIST Allocates Over $3 Million to Small Businesses Advancing AI, Biotechnology, Semiconductors, Quantum and More
news.summary: NIST is allocating funding to eight small businesses in seven states under the Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) program.

news.title: NIST Issues Broad Agency Announcement for Proposals to Advance Microelectronics Technologies
news.summary: The CHIPS for America funding opportunity will support critical research, prototyping and commercial solutions that advance microelectronics technology in the United States.

news.title: In Quantum Sensing, What Beats Beating Noise? Meeting Noise Halfway.
news.summary: A team including scientists at NIST may have found a new way of dealing with noise at the microscopic scales where quantum physics reigns.

news.title: NIST and Partners Use Quantum Mechanics to Make a Factory for Random Numbers
news.summary: Broadcast as a free public service, the beacon can be used anywhere an independent source of random numbers would be useful, such as selecting jury candidates or assigning resources through a lottery.

news.title: First Observation of Spin Hall Effect in a Quantum Gas Is Step Toward 'Atomtronics'
news.summary: Researchers at the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) have reported the first observation of the "spin Hall effect" in a Bose-Einstein con
